title: Deep Security Alignment
objective: Audit the existing security protocols and implement a temporary fallback monitor for the ProjectCortex.

tasks.intent: Analyze existing security protocols for ProjectCortex
Identify potential vulnerabilities and gaps in the security protocols for ProjectCortex
Implement a temporary fallback monitor for ProjectCortex to address identified vulnerabilities
Verify the effectiveness of the temporary fallback monitor
Document findings and recommendations for future improvements
